title: Compact Blocks | Create suitable
description: Few compact blocks for Create and Vanilla resources + QOL quartz craft for start game
body:
## 📦Compact even more resources than before!
Small mod which add 4 new blocks to help you better compact recources: Quartz, Rose Quartz, Flint and Amethyst.
May be added more in future!

## 🧱No andesite for your Flatworld? Not a problem anymore!
Mod adds QOL recipe for quartz out of cobblestone and flint to help in progress in Create Mod

## 📸Screenshots

![Crafts on Crafting table or with Mechanical Press](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dfeac7c9cc4ffc95866831f4a7be82da6c0ee87.png)
### Compact rose quartz block, Compact flint block, Compact quartz block and Compact amethyst block crafts

![Quartz craft from 2 flints and 2 cobblestones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6848a2a331369c6688d6703c8780b412f5977129.png)
### Quartz craft
